entry.title: Re: Stikcy section of a page / modal page

Hi @bill_froelich,

MDK (v. 24.7.0) on Business Application Studio

entry.title: Re: Function module for creating an entry in NAST table for generating an idoc
entry.content:
* Data Declaration
DATA: ls_nast TYPE nast,
lv_msg_doc TYPE char50,
lv_vbeln TYPE vbeln_vl.
* Constants
CONSTANTS: lc_v2 TYPE char2 VALUE 'V2',
lc_nacha TYPE char1 VALUE '6',
lc_vsztp TYPE char1 VALUE '4',
lc_zld2 TYPE char4 VALUE 'ZLD2',
lc_01 TYPE na_anzal VALUE '01',
lc_vstat TYPE na_vstat VALUE '1',
lc_msid TYPE sy-msgid VALUE 'E0',
lc_msgno TYPE sy-msgno VALUE '045'.
* Clear
CLEAR: ls_nast, lv_msg_doc, lv_vbeln.
* Logic to update NAST for all deliveries
LOOP AT p_li_docid INTO DATA(ls_docid).
lv_vbeln = ls_docid-docno+25(10).
lv_msg_doc = lv_docnum.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_INITIALIZE'.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_UPDATE'
EXPORTING
msg_arbgb = lc_msid
msg_nr = lc_msgno
msg_ty = lc_s
msg_v1 = lv_msg_doc.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_STORE' ##FM_SUBRC_OK
IMPORTING
msg_cmfpnr = ls_nast-cmfpnr
EXCEPTIONS
no_protocol_update = 1
OTHERS = 2.
ls_nast-spras = sy-langu.
ls_nast-anzal = lc_01.
ls_nast-vstat = lc_vstat. "'1'.
ls_nast-usnam = sy-uname.
ls_nast-kappl = lc_v2.
ls_nast-objky = lv_vbeln.
ls_nast-kschl = lc_zld2.
ls_nast-parnr = p_ls_cust-kunnr.
ls_nast-parvw = lc_we.
ls_nast-erdat = sy-datum.
ls_nast-eruhr = sy-uzeit.
ls_nast-nacha = lc_nacha.
ls_nast-vsztp = lc_vsztp.
ls_nast-manue = abap_true.
ls_nast-datvr = sy-datum.
ls_nast-uhrvr = sy-uzeit.

CALL FUNCTION 'RV_MESSAGE_UPDATE_SINGLE'
EXPORTING
msg_nast = ls_nast.

CLEAR: ls_docid, ls_nast.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: SAC OData - How to connect API with Authentication Bearer
entry.content:
Fairly sure authorization code here is synonymous for bearer.

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/1c1e36eeb99e420aa20ebe6e39af2b65.html?locale=en-US&q=Odata+bearer

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Porto
entry.content: Excelente ideia!

entry.title: Re: Adding a new record in NAST table via Z program
entry.content:
Use the below code in sequence 

 

* Data Declaration
DATA: ls_nast TYPE nast,
lv_msg_doc TYPE char50,
lv_vbeln TYPE vbeln_vl.
* Constants
CONSTANTS: lc_v2 TYPE char2 VALUE 'V2',
lc_nacha TYPE char1 VALUE '6',
lc_vsztp TYPE char1 VALUE '4',
lc_zld2 TYPE char4 VALUE 'ZLD2',
lc_01 TYPE na_anzal VALUE '01',
lc_vstat TYPE na_vstat VALUE '1',
lc_msid TYPE sy-msgid VALUE 'E0',
lc_msgno TYPE sy-msgno VALUE '045'.
* Clear
CLEAR: ls_nast, lv_msg_doc, lv_vbeln.
* Logic to update NAST for all deliveries
LOOP AT p_li_docid INTO DATA(ls_docid).
lv_vbeln = ls_docid-docno+25(10).
lv_msg_doc = lv_docnum.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_INITIALIZE'.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_UPDATE'
EXPORTING
msg_arbgb = lc_msid
msg_nr = lc_msgno
msg_ty = lc_s
msg_v1 = lv_msg_doc.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_STORE' ##FM_SUBRC_OK
IMPORTING
msg_cmfpnr = ls_nast-cmfpnr
EXCEPTIONS
no_protocol_update = 1
OTHERS = 2.
ls_nast-spras = sy-langu.
ls_nast-anzal = lc_01.
ls_nast-vstat = lc_vstat. "'1'.
ls_nast-usnam = sy-uname.
ls_nast-kappl = lc_v2.
ls_nast-objky = lv_vbeln.
ls_nast-kschl = lc_zld2.
ls_nast-parnr = p_ls_cust-kunnr.
ls_nast-parvw = lc_we.
ls_nast-erdat = sy-datum.
ls_nast-eruhr = sy-uzeit.
ls_nast-nacha = lc_nacha.
ls_nast-vsztp = lc_vsztp.
ls_nast-manue = abap_true.
ls_nast-datvr = sy-datum.
ls_nast-uhrvr = sy-uzeit.

CALL FUNCTION 'RV_MESSAGE_UPDATE_SINGLE'
EXPORTING
msg_nast = ls_nast.

CLEAR: ls_docid, ls_nast.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: update NAST
entry.content:
Use this code for updating NAST from custom program 

* Data Declaration
DATA: ls_nast TYPE nast,
lv_msg_doc TYPE char50,
lv_vbeln TYPE vbeln_vl.
* Constants
CONSTANTS: lc_v2 TYPE char2 VALUE 'V2',
lc_nacha TYPE char1 VALUE '6',
lc_vsztp TYPE char1 VALUE '4',
lc_zld2 TYPE char4 VALUE 'ZLD2',
lc_01 TYPE na_anzal VALUE '01',
lc_vstat TYPE na_vstat VALUE '1',
lc_msid TYPE sy-msgid VALUE 'E0',
lc_msgno TYPE sy-msgno VALUE '045'.
* Clear
CLEAR: ls_nast, lv_msg_doc, lv_vbeln.
* Logic to update NAST for all deliveries
LOOP AT p_li_docid INTO DATA(ls_docid).
lv_vbeln = ls_docid-docno+25(10).
lv_msg_doc = lv_docnum.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_INITIALIZE'.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_UPDATE'
EXPORTING
msg_arbgb = lc_msid
msg_nr = lc_msgno
msg_ty = lc_s
msg_v1 = lv_msg_doc.
CALL FUNCTION 'NAST_PROTOCOL_STORE' ##FM_SUBRC_OK
IMPORTING
msg_cmfpnr = ls_nast-cmfpnr
EXCEPTIONS
no_protocol_update = 1
OTHERS = 2.
ls_nast-spras = sy-langu.
ls_nast-anzal = lc_01.
ls_nast-vstat = lc_vstat. "'1'.
ls_nast-usnam = sy-uname.
ls_nast-kappl = lc_v2.
ls_nast-objky = lv_vbeln.
ls_nast-kschl = lc_zld2.
ls_nast-parnr = p_ls_cust-kunnr.
ls_nast-parvw = lc_we.
ls_nast-erdat = sy-datum.
ls_nast-eruhr = sy-uzeit.
ls_nast-nacha = lc_nacha.
ls_nast-vsztp = lc_vsztp.
ls_nast-manue = abap_true.
ls_nast-datvr = sy-datum.
ls_nast-uhrvr = sy-uzeit.

CALL FUNCTION 'RV_MESSAGE_UPDATE_SINGLE'
EXPORTING
msg_nast = ls_nast.

CLEAR: ls_docid, ls_nast.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Warehouse Operator Version 2.4 - What's new?
entry.content:
Great Job so far, especially the adhu movement is really helping.

Also critical imho is the confirmation of full hu's from bulk. 

 

br, Patrick

entry.title: Where can I start learning the all about the ey products of SAP Intelligent Asset Management (IAM)?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering Business Processes in SAP Intelligent Asset Management learning journey

Overview
This learning journey will introduce you to the business processes and capabilities of SAP Intelligent Asset Management which supports full digital representation of connected assets along their lifecycle delivering an embedded, collaborative and real-time set of next generation processes and systems.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, Business Users and Consultants will be able to ​identify the key products of SAP Intelligent Asset Management (IAM), describe how each IAM product contributes to the next-generation asset management and discover how the IAM solution can enhance your maintenance strategy.

Prerequisites

 

  • Discover SAP S/4HANA Asset Management and SAP S/4HANA Service

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Splitting Ordinary Time into three Valuations
entry.content:
Hello Aiofe,

the requirement is pretty straight forward and can be covered with a few time valuations - except the 15 min increments. This is possible, but as far as I remember you need a big chain of time valuations. Not quite sure, but I think a blog exists on that. 

And for the normal splitting after 30 minutes: investigate on the route time valuation type.  Do you know this blog where all the time valuation types are explained in more detail with examples?

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-setup-time-evaluation-in-time-tracking/ba-p/13545654 

I would have a look onto the "route" time valuation types. This works like an if clause. You can first check if the time outside of planned time is bigger than 29 minutes and then post to Toil.

Volker

entry.title: Re: Project Settlement Process
entry.content: Mohammed, Mass project settlement is carried out using t-code CJ8G. To settle to the final asset, you either need to adjust the parameters in the settlement transaction or ensure that the WBS Element is technically closed. Additionally, the final asset must already be manually assigned in the settlement rule for each WBS element. Regards

entry.title: Re: Custom Logic for S4HANA intercompany notification
entry.content:
Hi @htweko,

I would recommend exploring the use of business events. For example, you can trigger an event when a goods issue status changes in a delivery or you can trigger it when creating a new material document.

For more detailed information: Business Event Handling

Hope this helps.

Arturo

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - How to set HasStream="true" in a Entity or...
entry.content:
Hi @emorales

You will need to provide more details for the error you are getting on uploading.
Also, what is the approach that you are using for uploading the media.

I would suggest creating a separate Question for the issue providing the details.

 

Thanks,

Vaibhav Maheshwari

entry.title: Cloud ERP Essentials Webcast: Unlock Value Across Financial Planning, Close and Consolidation
entry.content:
Cloud ERP Essentials Webcast Series

Join us for an insightful webinar exploring the intersection of financial planning, close and consolidation, and reporting to unlock business value. Gain practical insights from industry experts on leveraging technology and data analytics to streamline processes, drive growth with agility, boost resilience, and maximize profitability. Don’t miss this opportunity to gain a competitive edge in today’s dynamic business landscape while continuing to help your organization grow! 

Read Anders Unlocking business value: From reporting to strategic financial planning blog on LinkedIn.

entry.title: Combining Responses from HTTP adapter in CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a flow where I am posting each record in S/4 and getting a document number against each successful posting. If the source file having 10 records, then I have to capture 10 document numbers from the responses and combine them and log as a text file.

Updated with 2 records and the response text are coming as below. Nedd to combine 2 & 3 body with newline and log that as text file

 

Please suggest how can this be achieved.

entry.title: Re: Always Wanted to Share Your Feedback on Our Documentation with Us?
entry.content: Great to see this!

entry.title: Unlock the Power of SAP Build and More During Devtoberfest Week 1
entry.content:
Devtoberfest is just around the corner, and we’ve got an exciting lineup of sessions specifically designed for you. Whether you’re getting started or looking to deepen your expertise, these sessions will provide hands-on insights into SAP Build and its latest capabilities.

 

Why Attend?

Attending these sessions will give you a front-row seat to the latest innovations, best practices, and success stories surrounding SAP Build. Plus, you’ll get the chance to interact with SAP experts and fellow Builders.

Join the event group to stay in the loop as Devtoberfest kicks off.

 

Devtoberfest 2024 Contest

By popular demand, we are bringing back the Devtoberfest contest! It’s a great way to stay motivated and engaged while you level up your skills. You can earn points from a variety of different activities to earn badges, swag, and the chance to win a grand prize.

Read more about the Devtoberfest contest here.

 

Mark Your Calendars

Don’t miss out! Be sure to check out the full schedule and reserve your spots for these must-attend sessions on Tuesday, September 24th.

  • Transform Data with Scripting in SAP Build Process Automation
  • Develop a Full-Stack CAP Application with SAP Build Code
  • Develop with SAP Build Apps Like a Pro
  • Real-World S/4HANA Invoice Approval Process with Process Automation

Stay tuned for more updates— We look forward to seeing you at Devtoberfest!

entry.title: Re: Number formatting changes when executing SAC Stories...
entry.content: Hello, I guess reason for the working workaround is that no lite viewer is used then. Once any script is part of the story it'll be opened in full viewer. @sastry-lingala: could you confirm that your issue is happening only in lite viewer?

entry.title: Re: Defining and Adapting Sections in OData V2 using "Tab...
entry.content: you can configure it in your app.

entry.title: Order of the primary key columns in Datasphere Tables
entry.content:
Hi Datasphere Experts,

I am creating a replication flow to bring SAP HANA data into Datasphere and dump it into a table I created. When I deploy the replication flow I get this error:

I have found that:

  1. the order of the table key in SAP is exactly the same as the order of the created table.
  2. The data type is exactly the same.
  3. The rest of the selected fields keep the same order as the original table.
  4. The fields are named the same and are automatically mapped in the replication flow projection.

El error lo da en el momento en el que despliego el flujo de replicación.

What other checks could you make to solve the problem?

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Access Request : User Provisionning
entry.content:
Hello

How could we create and provisioning users before the end of the entire request in SAP GRC?

For example, if I have need to have three validations before assigning role to user, how I can end the process after the first or the second approbation.

If someone can help please.

Thanks.

Best Regards.

entry.title: SAP MDK - How to edit an object inside another?
entry.content:
Hello community! As always, thanks for your help. I have the following problem...

I have a page called "Noticias_Detail.page", this page has two buttons: "Me gusta" and "No me gusta". The first button creates a record in the "NOTICIAPERSONALIKE" Entity database with its "LIKE" property set to "true". Right now everything works fine... so when I come back to this page and press the "No me gusta" button, my idea is to update the property of the previous record, making the "LIKE" property value false. This is my setup:

And this is my odata action to update entity:

When i try to press the "No me gusta" button I get the following error:

I can't figure out what's going on. If I try to access this record in my CAP service, I can see it:

These are the entities in my CAP service (if that helps):

entity NOTICIA : cuid, AUDITORIA {
    TITULO : String100;
    CUERPO : String5000;
    EMPRESA: Association to one EMPRESA;
    AREA : Association to one AREA;
    AUTOR : Association to one PERSONA;
    NOTICIAPERSONALIKES: Composition of many NOTICIAPERSONALIKE on NOTICIAPERSONALIKES.NOTICIA = $self;
}

entity NOTICIAPERSONALIKE : cuid, AUDITORIA {
    NOTICIA : Association to one NOTICIA;
    USUARIOLIKE : Association to one PERSONA;
    LIKE : Boolean default true;
}

I accept any help or suggestion, thanks

entry.title: SAP window frozen after lock windows
entry.content:
Hi,

Tthe SAP B1 client frozens after windows lock screen.

It doesn't even responds by clicking or right clicking on the windows task bar.

The PC uses windows 10 and SAP B1 is HANA 10 2208.

It happens with different users SAP was already removed and reinstalled.

Any ideia how to solve this ?

Thanks,
Paulo

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: Link not working
entry.content: Please post your question in "Questions about SAP Web Sites". People have also asked such questions, often the answers were to send an email to a generic address @sap.com.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the PM order type from one t...
entry.content:
hello, 

Yes, you can do it using the Business Function: Enterprise Asset Management Part 7 (LOG_EAM_CI_7) 

Enterprise Asset Management Part 7 | SAP Help Portal

After in Customizing:

Best regards, 

Àlex

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA FIORI Monitor Material Coverage / Alternative unit of measure
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

This is my first post so apologies in advance if I don't use the proper syntax or method (please fill free to advise me on the correct way in the comments)

I use the Fiori App Monitor Material Coverage - Net and Individual Segments on the 2020 version of SAP S/4 HANA

I would like to display (1) the shortage quantity in an alternative unit of measure for some materials in the first display view for example in Pallets

Or be able to display it on the second screen (material details)

I had a look at the Fiori Library to identify if a new version had this enhancement but it seems not

Any help would be welcome

I am eager to enhance my skills in SAP to advance my career and contribute more effectively to any organization.

Looking forward to the opportunity to learn and grow with this initiative and free certification attempt.

Best regards,

Trong

entry.title: Create Individual Payment Order For Each Document vs Grouping Docs into a Single Payment Order
entry.content:
We are prototyping the use of Payment Order to process credit card payment refunds.

Example: Contract Acct 5555 has two card payment documents (document numbers 111 and 222) that needs to be refunded.

The current behavior is that a single payment order is created when the payment program FPY1 is run. The payment order contains two items for docs 111 and 222.

Question: is it possible (and how) to create an individual payment order for each line item (or document) instead of bundling the documents into a single payment order.

For our business scenario, if the refund for payment doc 111 is approved but the refund for payment doc 222 is declined, two separate payment orders will allow the inclusion of the payment order for doc 111 into the payment order lot which in turn posts the refund, while the payment order for the declined refund (doc 222) can be reversed. 

On the other hand, the default single payment order for the two documents will need to go to clarification in order to process the refunds that have different results.

IS-PS-CA 617 (PS - Public Sector)
FI-CA 617
FI-CAX 617

Thank you for checking,

Raul

entry.title: Re: How to create package for ODN
entry.content: Can anyone help here?

entry.title: Re: Stikcy section of a page / modal page
entry.content:
In MDK today the only option for something like this would be with a Tab page where controls above the tabs are fixed and the page contents of the tabs scroll.  You could do this with a one tab page but will still get the tab displayed.  That might work for your use case.

In terms of having a page with this capability (not using tabs), I would recommend opening a feature request here. We'll review it based on its priority.

entry.title: Re: Sepa Direct Debit - Automatic Payment - due date
entry.content: Hi Cora, thanks for yuor answer, but my case concerns the payment method E “SEPA direct debit” and I would like to set the due date and the value date equal to the posting date. I would not like additional days to the due date and value date. Is it possible? Thanks for the support. Regards, Letizia

entry.title: How to automate PowerDesigner Web log file cleanup
entry.content:
Hello,

How to implement an automated process to clean up PowerDesigner Web Log files.
This process should help to delete files, eliminating the need for manual intervention.

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to automate PowerDesigner Web log file cleanup
entry.content:
Hello,

One way to automate the cleanup of PowerDesigner Web Log files is to implement a process that automatically deletes files from the \log folder.
We recommend not deleting the cmrserver.log file to avoid the need to stop the services in order to run the batch. You can delete all cmrserver_202*.log files at your convenience.

Please refer to the detailed steps provided in the Resolution section of KBA 3519994 - How to automate Portal log file cleanup.

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to edit an object inside another?
entry.content: To update the likes records when returning you need to target the specific like record.  The error message indicates you are trying to target the navigation property from the NOTICIA record instead of the NOTICIAPERSONALIKE record.

entry.title: Read SFTP Sender Excel file sheetname in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a scenario of getting an XLSX file from an SFTP (sender) using SAP CPI and sending to SAP S4. Here I need to get the sheet name before conversion to xml but I don't know how to do this reading to an Excel file.

Kindly share the groovy script code to read this before using converter class to convert to xml.

entry.title: Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check the Steps to Reset Cleared Items in Closed Posting Periods

1. Transaction Access:
Open transaction FBD1 (Reset Cleared Document) or FBRA (Reset Clearing Document).

2. Input Details:
Enter the clearing document number and company code for the document you wish to reset.

3. Execute Reset:
Run the reset process. This action will unlink the payment from the cleared invoice without making any postings.

4. Reallocate Payment:
Use transaction F28 (Post Incoming Payments) or F30 (Post with Clearing) to reallocate the payment to the intended invoice.
Ensure that you carefully select the appropriate invoice to avoid errors.

5. Closed Period Considerations:
Be cautious, as the posting period is closed. The system should allow the reallocation without posting, but verify that no unintended postings occur.

6. Verification:
After reallocating, doublecheck the new allocations in your AR records. Use transaction FBL5N to review open items and ensure accuracy.

Important Considerations

Authorization: Ensure you have the necessary authorizations to perform these actions, especially in closed periods.
Documentation: Keep records of your actions for auditing purposes, especially since you are working within closed posting periods.
Consultation: If you encounter restrictions, consider consulting with your finance or accounting team, as they may have specific protocols for handling closed periods.

entry.title: Update dimension data in sac analytic application using script
entry.content: my model dimension four dimension three are values one no value update the no value dimension in sac anlaytical application. How to update the dimension table data using a script in an SAC analytic application? When I select the dimension name, it should update the selected dimension name.

entry.title: Re: Problems with AppState in FIORI-App on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi 

Please try this 

1. Check if Your App is Set Up for FLP

Open `manifest.json`
Look for the section: `"sap.flp"`—this indicates FLP integration.
Confirm the presence of `"routing"` under `"sap.ui5"`.

2. Check App State Management

Inspect `manifest.json`
Under `"routing"`, ensure you have defined routes like this:
```json
"routes": [
{
"pattern": "",
"name": "ListReport",
"target": "ListReport"
},
{
"pattern": "Object/{objectId}",
"name": "ObjectPage",
"target": "ObjectPage"
}
]
```

Review Your Component
In `Component.js`, check for state management in `createContent` or `init` methods.

3. Update Router Configuration

Confirm Router Setup
Ensure your routes point to the correct views and targets in the `targets` section of `manifest.json`.

Quick Test

Launch Your App
Open the Fiori Launchpad and run your app to see if it displays correctly and handles navigation as expected.

By following these steps, you can quickly verify your app's setup for the Fiori Launchpad

entry.title: Memory cleanup / reduction
entry.content: Hello, can you please let us know if there are any best practices or opportunities with storage cleanup.  For example, can we "achieve" or  adjust older data.  My only concern is compliance requirements for storage. (ie: Medicare / 10 years)

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM system availability alert
entry.content: Hi Anita,

entry.title: Re: Read SFTP Sender Excel file sheetname in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello, 

Try the below groovy code that reads an Excel file and retrieves the sheet names before converting it to XML. This code uses Apache POI library, which is commonly used to work with Excel files in Java and Groovy.

import org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook
import org.apache.poi.ss.usermodel.WorkbookFactory
import java.io.InputStream

def getSheetNamesFromExcel(InputStream inputStream) {
// Create a workbook instance from the Excel file
def workbook = WorkbookFactory.create(inputStream)

// Get the sheet names
def sheetNames = []
for (int i = 0; i < workbook.getNumberOfSheets(); i++) {
sheetNames.add(workbook.getSheetName(i))
}
workbook.close()

return sheetNames
}

// Example usage: Assume 'body' contains the Excel file input stream
def excelInputStream = message.getBody(InputStream)
def sheetNames = getSheetNamesFromExcel(excelInputStream)

// Log the sheet names
sheetNames.each { sheetName ->
messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Sheet Name", sheetName, "text/plain")
}

 

Make sure to import Apache POI libraries (e.g., poi-ooxml, poi).

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM system availability alert
entry.content:
Hi, Anita,
For SAP S/4HANA on-premise systems, Health Monitoring offers a System Heartbeat metric. 

If the heartbeat is ok, you know the system is available.  Else, it is not. 

I checked the Event configuration and it does not currently allow you to configure an event for this metric.  This is a candidate for the Influence Campaign.  You can submit ideas at:

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3525
 - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501
Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: Plant Maintenance module without HR(SAP HCM)
entry.content:
So yes I appreciate both answers, and it looks like this mini HR is the one. Is it mini HR due to the minimal usage?

I was told no for utilizing the HR module, as a work around, I made Mx Techs into workcenters... then replaced the Mn.Wrk.ctr: into them... I don't like it, but, it's what is given me. I really need the metrics and KPIs, like to see everyone and track time on jobs, multiple techs on a call and split them out to cover other calls. 

I will have all of this with mini HR, correct? A quick look-through shows it will be necessary for MM module when I finally get that! I will complete a workup on mini HR and bring that forward.

THANK YOU ALL, tuts, articles, howtos, and anything will be helpful...

entry.title: Re: Does Cloud ALM support ChaRM
entry.content: Nevermind....Deepa has this info in reply.

entry.title: Re: How can we add entry in TKEVG table ?
entry.content: You can manage the Char Groups and Cycles thru here:

entry.title: Re: SAC: Not equal to sign in Data Action script?
entry.content: Hi @ThomasK

entry.title: Re: SAC: Not equal to sign in Data Action script?
entry.content: Can we define multiple member with != for example

entry.title: Re: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content:
Hello, thanks everyone for guiding me.. I have found the solution by using a below code at USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE to skip the error deliveries without stopping the background job.

if delivery contains an errors and sy-batch = 'X'.  "ct_finchdel (IF_EX_LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC~DELIVERY_FINAL_CHECK)

            DELETE ct_vbuk WHERE vbeln = <lfs_likp>-vbeln.  "$       1 entry
            DELETE ct_vbup WHERE vbeln = <lfs_likp>-vbeln. "$       1 entry
*           clearing Update indicator so that delivery cannot be created and deleting the temp delivery no. so that delivery no. should not be assigned
            CLEAR: <lfs_likp>-updkz, <lfs_likp>-vbeln.
*           Deleting the entries from VBPA
            CLEAR: ct_vbpa, ct_vbuv.

* Set the UPDKZ as D for the entries with VBELN as "$    1" in the ct_lips and ct_vbfa

endif.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to edit an object inside another?
entry.content: Hi bill, Hi Bill! Thanks, I understand what you mean, I did what you say (I think) and I get this error:

entry.title: Re: SAC OData - How to connect API with Authentication Be...
entry.content:
Hi MatthiasL,

Thanks for your prompt feedback. I already went through this same link before and indeed it seems that this refers also to the same authentication type list I presented previously in my post.

Except error, we can see for example that in the pre requisite for this option you can even see that "token request with URL encoded" is needed as well as "CLient ID" and Client "Secret Encoded".. which I clearly don't have.

I'm afraid this is not exactly the solution for my case yet.

Thank you so far,

entry.title: VB21 and VK11 with same condition and the tables in same order but does not show same in both transa
entry.content: VB21 same contion typeVK11 same condition type

entry.title: Create org structure at S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Is there any way to create HR structure and Employees at S4H Public Cloud rather than the replication? Org unit , and positions and there relations with employees.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Create org structure at S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content: The creation of HR org structures depends on external replication / integration (for example SF employee central). Creation and maintenance of employees, in the other hand, can be done within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Edition via apps like "Manage Workforce", for example.

entry.title: Re: How to consume OData services within PaPM
entry.content:
Aamazing !

Could you please share for cloud version of PAPM.

entry.title: SAP EWM - Receiving of multiple crates (HU's) for the single finished product from the Production
entry.content:
Hi Experts, We need your help on the EWM requirement from the Hitech industry client and the requirement is as below.

once the FG is produced it will need to be received in EWM with the multiple crates (HU's) since the FG consists of multiple sub-assemblies. In system the product qty is one that is Finished Goods.

As per the client they will be keeping these crates in different bins after production receipt if there is space no available in the single bin.

Is there a way to have multiple crates/HU's (Dummy Hu's) tagged to a single product which is received from the production and if yes how do we track these multiple crates/Hu's in the warehouse which comes out of production.

EWM - Goods Movement

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Status in SAP Business ByDesign (Monitoring Purchase Order)
entry.content:
Hi Priyanka,

Im faced with an issue where im only expecting invoices against a PO and no GRN. 

So when an invoice is posted the PO status changes to finished, but if we cancel the invoice, the PO status remains finished and invoicing status on header says 'manually invoiced'.

Why doesn't the PO status change back to Sent ? Are we doing something wrong ?

Let me know. Thanks

 

Regards,

Waqar

entry.title: Re: BTP-"Error during fetching the JWT Token Keys. Please...
entry.content:
Solved it by updating the JAVA installation by downloading latest JAVA JRE.

Steps to update or install Java: https://www.java.com/en/download/manual.jsp

entry.title: Re: Create org structure at S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content: While replication from EC to S4H public cloud,  i can’t see the position and other org elements. So where i can see it in S4H ?

entry.title: Re: How to manage Mitigation Control assignment Approval workflow in GRC-IAG Bridge ?
entry.content:
Hi,

Have a look at SAP note 3239757 - IAG job to synchronize the mitigation controls and user - mitigation control assignments from Access Control 12.0 to IAG.

Your Mitigation workflow will run in AC as it is and once you have new mitigation setup , sync it to IAG.

Regards,

Uppdeep

entry.title: Add MicroProcessFlowItem to MicroProcessFlow inside table
entry.content:
Hello i'm triying to add a custom MicroProcessFlowItem (with diferents icons) but i don't know what's wrong with my example code:

<Table id="table" enableSelectAll="false" rows="{odataModel>/}" enableBusyIndicator="true" ariaLabelledBy="title" paste="onPaste">
<columns>
	<Column autoResizable="true">
		<m:Label text="Sales order item"/>
		<template>
			<layout:VerticalLayout>
				<m:Button class="sapUiTinyMarginBeginEnd" icon="sap-icon://alert" type="Ghost"
					text="{odataModel>id}">
					<m:customData>
						<m:BadgeCustomData key="badge" value="{odataModel>idCountDocs}"/>
					</m:customData>
				</m:Button>
			</layout:VerticalLayout>
		</template>
	</Column>
	<Column autoResizable="true">
		<m:Label text="Etapa"/>
		<template>
			<m:Link text="{odataModel>desc}" wrapping="true"/>
		</template>
		<template>
			<comm:MicroProcessFlow renderType="NoWrap">
			</comm:MicroProcessFlow>
		</template>
	</Column>
</columns>
</Table>

And this is my function that is responsible to add the items based on the data associated:

updateFinished2 : function() {
	var that = this,
	oTable	 = this.getView().byId("table");
	oTable.getRows().forEach(function (oItem) {
		oItem.getAggregation("cells")[2].addContent([
			new MicroProcessFlowItem({icon:"sap-icon://alert", state:"Success"}),
			new MicroProcessFlowItem({icon:"sap-icon://address-book", state:"Error"})
		]);
	});
}

But i get this error:

Can someone help me or if you soome example i´ll apreciate

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

My name is Erika, and I am excited to join this vibrant community. I spent 7 years in fintech, where I developed a passion
for establishing data-based decisions in HR operations. Growing up in
Hungary, I obtained my diploma before moving to Switzerland. My career
began in a classical HR manager position, but I soon found my passion
in HR digitization.

Throughout my career, I have realized how many biases and distorting
factors exist in performance management. I look forward to a new "world order" where these issues are addressed and improved.

Currently, I am facing a challenging period as my contract is coming
to an end, and finding a new job in Switzerland has been tough due to
the competitive HR market. Despite these challenges, I am determined
to advance my career in HR digitization.

I have noticed that over 50% of large Swiss organizations use SAP
SuccessFactors, and it has become my dream to become a professional in
this field. I am eager to connect with fellow professionals, learn
from your experiences, and contribute to the community.

Looking forward to the big learning journey and engaging with you all!

Best regards,
Erika

entry.title: Re: Birthday and Anniversary alerts to the employees in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi!! I did this configuration in my instance, but Im not receiving the email, is an additionall step that is not mentioned in the Blog needed? 

I created the alert message (Manage Data), the workflow (manage org, pay and job structures) and the Business Rule as in the screenshots, but maybe there is an additional step like Email Notification Template, a group that needs to be created... or maybe some work-around that may help?

Hello Vihaan,

you can check the Fiori Apps Reference Library for details about the installation and configuration of that app. Adjust it to your specific S/4HANA version in the header.

entry.title: Multi Action - Dynamically derive period for Data Lock step
entry.content:
Hello Gurus - I have a multi action that is being called in Calendar Event. This multi action would extract the data from S4 and loads into SAC Dimensions and Models. While loading the data into models, I am unlocking all periods and locking them back once the loads are completed. However, this is locking the forecast period which is causing issues with Planning.

Any input on passing forecast period dynamically to "Data Locking Step" in multi action? I have forecast starting and ending months in a dimension with member id WKFCSTDEF and properties StartMonth and EndMonth. Please do remember, this multi action is called from Calendar event as daily job.

Any other alternate approach is also fine with me. I want to unlock forecast period after daily loads.

Thanks,

PS

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Unable to launch booster for IS despite subscribing to Integration suite
entry.content: In my trial account, i have subscribed to the Integration suite and added all the roles(including integration provisioner...) , But when i go to cockpit, i cannot see an option to design. I tried to run the booster for enabling Integration suite but that tells me i have NOT subscribed to the integration suite..how is that even possible.

entry.title: Re: Unable to launch booster for IS despite subscribing to Integration suite
entry.content:
yes, i tried to log out and then cleared the cache, rebooted the pc and tried again..same result.

i waited for a couple of hours after logging out and clearing cache, and retried it with same results, i can see i have subscribed to Integration suite but the booster message is - you have not subscribed to the Integration suite.

entry.title: Re: Not enough permissions for Kyma

But I now realized I was not in a trial account so the UI is different.

entry.title: Re: Consume HANA views in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

We have similar scenario, we created SDI(DPagent), SDA cloud connector based on premise HANA Connections. When i am importing HANA Views as remote tables from  _SYS_BIC. i am able to see structure. But Input parameters and variables are not getting passed to datasphere? we don't want to develop all HANA views again in datasphere. did any one faced same issue? any issue with my connectors? any other alternative solution?.

Regards,

Joe

entry.title: Re: Read SFTP Sender Excel file sheetname in SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello Amar, The code is already in groovy and it should work fine provided you have imported the mentioned Apache POI libraries.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to edit an object inside another?

entry.title: Re: Alv grid + subtotal issue while exporting into spreadsheet
entry.content: issue 2 -> Have you rechecked reference of table and field on building catalog?

entry.title: Re: Unable to launch booster for IS despite subscribing to Integration suite

entry.title: Re: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content: @RaviSeeThanks for the feedback. You'd better post a separate answer, it will be difficult to find it at the end of this unrelated answer. NB: what is this comment in your code: "ct_finchdel (IF_EX_LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC~DELIVERY_FINAL_CHECK)"?

entry.title: Re: Not enough permissions for Kyma
entry.content:
To add administrators I went to the BTP cockpit for the organization -> sub account.
Then selected Instances and Subscriptions.
Found the Environment for Kyma and clicked on it.

Then click on the "..." for the Kyma environment and select "View Parameters".
Copy the JSON to an editor and add the administrators as a comma separated list.

Then click again on the "..." for the Kyma environment and selected "Update".
Click next on the update to get to the Parameters section.
Do not use the form and instead edit the json (can also click "View current Configuration")
Paste the json from the previous step (as the form wipes out previous settings).
Click next and then "Update Instance"

entry.title: How to Pass parameter value from MD04 to custom tcode
entry.content:
I would like the pass the input data from MD04 to the custom tcode which I am creating. How to do so.

Or how to see the material availability for the planned orders from MD04 screen

entry.title: Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content: @MaximoSanchez You're very welcome! I'm glad we could help )

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to edit an object inside another?
entry.content: You need to make sure your {@odata.readLink} is pointing to the specific NOTICIAPERSONALIKE record you want to update. Depending on your page and how you navigated to this page I am guessing it is pointing to NOTICIA instead. You would need to lookup or have access to the correct readLink or use the appropriate Query Options to point to the one record to be updated.

entry.title: calculation of TRLT of material by considering all BOM level
entry.content:
I would like to calculate the TRLT of a header material by adding the RLT of all BOM at lower level.

Is there any report to do this in standard by considering the production version and procurement type.

entry.title: Replication of HANA Views from on prem HANA to datasphere
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have on prem HANA with HANA Views (Graphical, table function based SQL based with variables and input parameters ), we don't want to develop all HANA views again in datasphere. we thought of levergaing remote tables option. So we created SDI(DPagent), SDA cloud connector based on premise HANA Connections. When i am importing HANA Views as remote tables from  _SYS_BIC. i am able to see structure. But  Input parameters and variables are not getting passed to datasphere?  wherever we have mandatory Input parameters and variables we see errors and no data. did any one faced same issue? any issue with my connectors? any other alternative solution?.

Thanks for reading this and i appreciate and welcome your inputs.

Regards,

Joe

entry.title: Need Help: SAP GUI restart after press on a customize GUI Status
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

One of the users facing issue on their SAP GUI will restart after they press on a button at customize GUI Status.  The feature of that button is:

  • Update log on ztable
  • get data from smartform submission 
  • send email 

Which part should I start to investigate? This issue seems to something it cannot debug. And this occurs to only a user, and sometimes they work with the program well without faceing sap gui restart. If you have any idea to check, please let me know.

Best Regards,

Sutthawee

entry.title: COFC Period Posting issue for Work Order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Under what circumstances a record will be confirmed through CAT9 and appear in COFC even when the period is locked for posting.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: Re: Advice on Where to Begin with Learning Journeys
entry.content:
Hello @chloestonecipher,

Welcome to the SAP Community! 😊

Although I’m still at the beginning of my learning journey, I can still offer you some helpful advice.

Especially in the early stages, SAP can feel incredibly overwhelming, and it’s often difficult to know where to focus. That’s why I’d like to share a few recommendations that helped me gain a clear overview and better navigate the SAP landscape.

 

Learning Journeys:

Getting Started with Support from SAP (Support Accreditation)

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/getting-started-with-support-from-sap-support-accreditation

Executing Basic ERP processes with SAP S/4HANA:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/executing-basic-erp-processes-with-sap-s-4hana

Discovering the Value of SAP S/4HANA for Central Finance:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-the-value-of-sap-s-4hana-for-central-finance

If your company is involved in manufacturing, the following course could also be highly beneficial. It offers the opportunity to broaden your perspective and gain a deeper understanding of the processes and activities in other departments within the organization.

Discovering the Basics of SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-the-basics-of-sap-s-4hana-manufacturing

Useful Blogpost:

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-blog-posts/how-to-transform-yourself-from-a-fresher-to-an-expert-sap-consultant/ba-p/13009859

 

A Few Key Tips for Working with SAP

If you have access to a test system, I highly recommend using it to explore and experiment. This hands-on experience will allow you to get familiar with the system without the fear of causing any disruptions. However, it’s always a good idea to check with your colleagues before making any changes, even in a test environment.

Additionally, a valuable piece of advice is to document everything you do in SAP. Yes, it can be time-consuming, but the process of writing things down helps reinforce your learning. More importantly, having detailed documentation to reference in case of any issues or troubleshooting needs is invaluable. It can save time and provide clarity in critical situations.

Help.SAP is your friend. There can you find everything about the SAP ecosystem. For example If you dont understand what a transaction does, go to help.sap and there is the much needed documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/

Pro Tip: Leverage the SAPTERM transaction, which serves as SAP's internal terminology repository. This resource is invaluable for accessing standardized SAP terms and ensuring consistent language usage across projects and documentation.

These are the key tips and insights I can share with you based on my experiences so far. Should anything else come to mind or if I learn something new, I will provide additional comments or updates accordingly.

I hope this answer helps. 😁

 

Kind Regards,

Jerry

entry.title: Unable to create Job Scheduler for specific tenant
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have an SaaS on SAP BTP, which is an SAP CAP-based application. Our application is bound to the Job Scheduler Service via MTA, ensuring that the binding is created for every application instance. Each customer tenant subscribed to our application can create a job for their sub-account. However, for a specific customer sub-account, the job is not being created, and I am receiving the following error:

{"error":"invalid_client","error_description":"Bad credentials"}

Additionally, I am using the customer authentication url (https://<subdomain>.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token) provided by Authorization and Trust Management Service (xsuaa) instance and the client ID and client secret of the Job Scheduler instance of our provider account. Any insights or suggestions to resolve this issue would be greatly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: SQ02 Infoset join to additional field
entry.content:
Hi,

My objective is to link sales orders to process orders (VBAK and AFPO) in a report. The issue is that our configuration is MTS with final assembly and not MTO, so we are creating process orders (COR1) and not production orders so we can't create and order against a specific sales order.

I first tried to use a non-used field in sales order to provide the process order number like VBAK-IHREZ and then link AFPO-AUFNR to VBAK-IHREZ. It did not work of course.

Then I tried to create an Extra > Additional field ZAUFNR like AFPO-AUFNR and code VBAK-IHREZ Move TO ZAUFNR and link AFPO to ZAUFNR. The output is all blank field except AUFNR where the correct process order is populated. 

Is there a way to achieve that with a custom field? Or any other workarounds? 

Thanks for your support!

Carl

entry.title: Re: Project Settlement Process
entry.content: Thanks very much Marico

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I need your assistance with queries below:

I am currently unemployed and working towards completing the "SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement C_TS452" certification using my personal Gmail account. I would like to be part of the “Digital Skills Initiative Program” and looking forward to emailing the completion screenshot before Dec 1st, 2024, and earning the redemption code to schedule my exam however, unable to access the course as it needs to be paid for the subscription. 

Question - I would like to know if the “SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement C_TS452" certification falls under this program, as I identify as a person in one of these categories:

  1.        Woman
  2.        Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location
  3.        People looking to switch their careers mid-life
  4.        People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

If yes, how do I access the study material for free?

I would be grateful for any support available. Thank you for your time and support.

Best regards,

Prakriti Patil

entry.title: Re: 🌟 Bem-vindos à nossa comunidade de Consultores SAP em Curitiba! 🌟
entry.content:
Grande Luiz! Seja bem vindo aos grupos da Comunidade SAP! Espero pode participar de algum Meet Up em Curitiba algum dia!

Abraço
